notes: Core structure exists but platform collision is broken (getGroundPlatform uses wrong bounds logic making player fall through most platforms), barrel traversal logic is flawed, climbing detection is unreliable, and the game is largely unplayable due to these physics bugs.

It has a playable start/end loop and basic climbing/barrels, but major Donkey Kong mechanics are incomplete or inaccurate, platform/ladder physics are rough, barrels behave incorrectly, and the presentation is only a loose approximation.
